module.name: pixelgrid
module.description: A grayscale pixel image of any R×C size. Cells hold a formula (KaTeX) or a value (auto-shaded black→white). An optional 2nd body section draws labelled projection-beam arrows (rows / columns / diagonals).
module.aiSpec:
A GRAYSCALE PIXEL IMAGE of ANY size (R rows × C columns) — draw a tomography / reconstruction image both symbolically (x_1 …) AND with concrete pixel values, and optionally overlay labelled PROJECTION BEAMS (arrows through the pixels).
Block module. The body has ONE or TWO sections split by `<!-- @ -->`:
SECTION 1 = the grid. One ROW per line, cells separated by ` | `. The grid size follows the body (3 lines of 3 cells = 3×3). Cell content: • a plain number (e.g. 3, 1.5) → shaded by value AND shows the number • a formula / text (e.g. \(x_1\)) → shown as-is (KaTeX), NOT shaded • `disp::value` (e.g. \(x_1\)::3) → shows the label, shaded as if its value were 3 Grayscale: value vmin → black, vmax → white (invert: true flips it). vmin default 0; vmax default = the largest value in the grid.
SECTION 2 (optional) = projection beams, ONE per line, `spec : label`: • `row N : <label>` — horizontal beam through row N (1-based), arrow → • `col N : <label>` — vertical beam through column N, arrow ↓ • `diag : <label>` — main diagonal beam (top-left → bottom-right), arrow ↘ • `adiag : <label>` — anti-diagonal beam (top-right → bottom-left), arrow ↙ The label is a formula (\(y_1\)) or a number; it is drawn in a chip at the beam's exit. Beam params: beamcolor (default #f97316), beammargin (px reserved around the grid for beams/labels, default 72).
Other params: size (cell px, default 80), gap (default 4px), vmin, vmax, invert (bool), showvalue (bool, default true). For a hue-coloured numeric grid use @heatmap instead.
<!-- @pixelgrid --> \(x_1\) | \(x_2\) \(x_3\) | \(x_4\) <!-- @ --> row 1 : \(y_1\) row 2 : \(y_2\) col 1 : \(y_3\) col 2 : \(y_4\) diag : \(y_5\) adiag : \(y_6\) <!-- @end -->

param.name: size
param.label: Cell size (px)
param.desc: Width/height of each square cell, in pixels.

param.name: vmax
param.label: Scale max (→ white)
param.desc: Value mapped to white. Blank = the largest value in the grid.

param.name: invert
param.label: Invert (high = black)
param.desc: Flip the scale so a high value is dark instead of light.

param.name: showvalue
param.label: Show number
param.desc: Print the number inside each numeric cell (off = pure shading).

param.name: beamcolor
param.label: Beam color
param.desc: Color of the projection-beam arrows and their labels.

param.name: beammargin
param.label: Beam margin (px)
param.desc: Space reserved around the grid for beams and their labels.
